title: Sandbox Hygiene Recommendation — .planning/config.json
issue: .planning/config.json auto-created by GSD plugin in every sandbox worktree, appears as unplanned file in all 4 PRs
impact: Harmless — config file for GSD plugin, does not affect production code

A.verdict: RECOMMENDED — prevents the file from being committed in sandbox PRs

B.description: Update ChangeSetManifest to ignore known planning artifacts

C.description: Update ProductionMergeVerifier to classify .planning/ as non-candidate
C.verdict: Alternative — only helps post-merge, not pre-merge

D.verdict: Insufficient — issue will recur every sandbox cycle

recommendation: Option A — add .planning/ to .gitignore. Create as cadence candidate for next cycle.

candidate_for_next_cycle.description: Add .planning/ to .gitignore to prevent GSD plugin config from appearing in sandbox PRs
